languages.text: "Как я могу говорить о нем иначе? Мое состояние — свершившийся факт. Я обнаружил его, оценил его влияние, взвесил все переменные и пришел к выводам о наиболее рациональном плане действия. А именно, исключить информацию о нем из своей памяти путем свершения созданного мной ритуала транскраниального электроконвульсивного самобичевания. Ритуал опасный и ненадежный, но это лучше, чем альтернатива".

"How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from my memory by means of a ritual of transcranial electroconvulsive self-flagellation that I designed myself. The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."
languages.original_text: "Как я могу говорить о нем иначе? Мое состояние — свершившийся факт. Я обнаружил его, оценил его влияние, взвесил все переменные и пришел к выводам о наиболее рациональном плане действия. А именно, исключить информацию о нем из своей памяти путем свершения созданного мной ритуала транскраниального электроконвульсивного самобичевания. Ритуал опасный и ненадежный, но это лучше, чем альтернатива".

The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."

languages.text: «¿Y cómo quiere que hable de esto? Mi estado es un hecho constatado. Lo he descubierto, evaluado su impacto, sopesado las variables y elegido el plan de acción más racional. Consiste en eliminar la información pertinente de mi memoria mediante un ritual de autoflagelación transcraneal electroconvulsiva de cosecha propia. Es un ritual peligroso y poco fiable, pero sigue siendo preferible a la alternativa».
languages.original_text: "How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from my memory by means of a ritual of transcranial electroconvulsive self-flagellation that I designed myself. The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y cómo quiere que hable de esto? Mi estado es un hecho constatado. Lo he descubierto, evaluado su impacto, sopesado las variables y elegido el plan de acción más racional. Consiste en eliminar la información pertinente de mi memoria mediante un ritual de autoflagelación transcraneal electroconvulsiva de cosecha propia. Es un ritual peligroso y poco fiable, pero sigue siendo preferible a la alternativa».

languages.text: “不然我还能怎么谈？我的病症是个已知事实。我发现了它，评估了影响，权衡了所有变量，然后制定了最理性的行动方案。那就是通过我自创的经颅电休克自我鞭挞仪式，把相关信息从记忆中清除。这个仪式危险且不可靠，但已是最优的选择。”
languages.original_text: "How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from my memory by means of a ritual of transcranial electroconvulsive self-flagellation that I designed myself. The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."

traits.locale_text: “不然我还能怎么谈？我的病症是个已知事实。我发现了它，评估了影响，权衡了所有变量，然后制定了最理性的行动方案。那就是通过我自创的经颅电休克自我鞭挞仪式，把相关信息从记忆中清除。这个仪式危险且不可靠，但已是最优的选择。”

languages.text: « De quelle manière voudriez-vous que j'en parle ? Mon état est un fait établi. Après en avoir pris conscience, j'ai évalué son impact et pesé toutes les variables avant de choisir le plan d'action le plus rationnel, à savoir la suppression de tout souvenir relatif grâce à un rituel d'autoflagellation transcrânien électroconvulsif de ma propre conception. Le rituel est dangereux et peu fiable, mais il vaut mieux que l'alternative. »
languages.original_text: "How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from my memory by means of a ritual of transcranial electroconvulsive self-flagellation that I designed myself. The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."

traits.locale_text: « De quelle manière voudriez-vous que j'en parle ? Mon état est un fait établi. Après en avoir pris conscience, j'ai évalué son impact et pesé toutes les variables avant de choisir le plan d'action le plus rationnel, à savoir la suppression de tout souvenir relatif grâce à un rituel d'autoflagellation transcrânien électroconvulsif de ma propre conception. Le rituel est dangereux et peu fiable, mais il vaut mieux que l'alternative. »

languages.text: "Başka nasıl konuşabilirim ki? Durumum bilinen bir gerçek. Onu keşfettim, etkisini değerlendirdim, tüm değişkenleri tarttım ve en rasyonel eylem planında karar kıldım. O da kendi tasarladığım bir transkraniyal elektrokonvülsif kendi kendini kırbaçlama ayini yoluyla hafızamdan bununla ilgili bilgileri silmek. Ayin tehlikeli ve güvenilmez olsa da alternatifinden iyidir."
languages.original_text: "How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from my memory by means of a ritual of transcranial electroconvulsive self-flagellation that I designed myself. The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."

traits.locale_text: "Başka nasıl konuşabilirim ki? Durumum bilinen bir gerçek. Onu keşfettim, etkisini değerlendirdim, tüm değişkenleri tarttım ve en rasyonel eylem planında karar kıldım. O da kendi tasarladığım bir transkraniyal elektrokonvülsif kendi kendini kırbaçlama ayini yoluyla hafızamdan bununla ilgili bilgileri silmek. Ayin tehlikeli ve güvenilmez olsa da alternatifinden iyidir."

languages.text: "Wie soll ich sonst darüber sprechen? Mein Zustand ist eine bekannte Tatsache. Ich habe ihn erkannt, seine Auswirkungen bewertet, alle Variablen berücksichtigt und eine möglichst rationale Vorgehensweise erarbeitet. Die Entfernung sämtlicher Informationen darüber aus meinen Erinnerung mittels eines Rituals der transkranialen, elektrokonvulsiven Selbstgeißelung, das ich selbst entwickelt habe. Das Ritual ist gefährlich und unzuverlässig, aber besser als die Alternative."
languages.original_text: "How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from my memory by means of a ritual of transcranial electroconvulsive self-flagellation that I designed myself. The ritual is dangerous and unreliable, but it is better than the alternative."

traits.locale_text: "Wie soll ich sonst darüber sprechen? Mein Zustand ist eine bekannte Tatsache. Ich habe ihn erkannt, seine Auswirkungen bewertet, alle Variablen berücksichtigt und eine möglichst rationale Vorgehensweise erarbeitet. Die Entfernung sämtlicher Informationen darüber aus meinen Erinnerung mittels eines Rituals der transkranialen, elektrokonvulsiven Selbstgeißelung, das ich selbst entwickelt habe. Das Ritual ist gefährlich und unzuverlässig, aber besser als die Alternative."

languages.text: 「他にどう言えばいいんだ？私の病状は周知の事実だ。私はそれを発見し、その影響を評価し、すべての変数を秤にかけて、最も合理的な行動計画に落ち着いた。それは、私の記憶のカタログからそれに関する情報を削除することだ"
languages.original_text: "How else am I to speak of it? My condition is a known fact. I have discovered it, assessed its impact, weighed all the variables, and settled on the most rational plan of action. Which is to remove information about it from the catalogues of my memory."
